## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Prophecy.io team and Marcel Santilli from GrowthX.ai to explore potential collaboration on AI-driven content marketing strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/MjRumGz4RVnm9XFyG7fiqBMkozF2ay8W?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX.ai offers AI-powered content creation services, combining expert strategy with efficient AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/MjRumGz4RVnm9XFyG7fiqBMkozF2ay8W?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)
  - [Their approach focuses on creating high-quality, relevant content at scale (up to 100,000 words/month) for $9,000/month](https://fathom.video/share/MjRumGz4RVnm9XFyG7fiqBMkozF2ay8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
  - [Prophecy.io is revisiting their content strategy, seeking ways to improve quality, relevance, and scalability](https://fathom.video/share/MjRumGz4RVnm9XFyG7fiqBMkozF2ay8W?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai's services could potentially address Prophecy.io's content challenges, particularly in SEO and thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/MjRumGz4RVnm9XFyG7fiqBMkozF2ay8W?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX.ai Background and Approach

  - [Founded by Marcel Santilli, leveraging experience from IBM, HP, HashiCorp, Scale AI, and DeepGram](https://fathom.video/share/MjRumGz4RVnm9XFyG7fiqBMkozF2ay8W?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Focuses on AI-driven content creation and organic growth strategies](https://fathom.video/share/MjRumGz4RVnm9XFyG7fiqBMkozF2ay8W?tab=summary&timestamp=295.0)
  - [Reached $2M ARR in 5 months with 20 customers, including Reddit and Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/MjRumGz4RVnm9XFyG7fiqBMkozF2ay8W?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Combines AI workflows with human expertise for high-quality, scalable content production](https://fathom.video/share/MjRumGz4RVnm9XFyG7fiqBMkozF2ay8W?tab=summary&timestamp=714.0)

### Content Strategy and SEO Perspectives

  - [Marcel emphasizes becoming "the best answer" to audience questions, rather than focusing solely on SEO](https://fathom.video/share/MjRumGz4RVnm9XFyG7fiqBMkozF2ay8W?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [AI enables deeper, more personalized content creation and audience understanding](https://fathom.video/share/MjRumGz4RVnm9XFyG7fiqBMkozF2ay8W?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [Prophecy.io team expressed challenges with previous agency work lacking domain expertise and scalability](https://fathom.video/share/MjRumGz4RVnm9XFyG7fiqBMkozF2ay8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Discussion on balancing established keywords with newer, innovative language in the data integration space](https://fathom.video/share/MjRumGz4RVnm9XFyG7fiqBMkozF2ay8W?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)

### GrowthX.ai Workflow and Services

  - [Comprehensive keyword analysis and clustering (e.g., 55,000 keywords for Reddit)](https://fathom.video/share/MjRumGz4RVnm9XFyG7fiqBMkozF2ay8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
  - [Custom relevance scoring and user intent analysis](https://fathom.video/share/MjRumGz4RVnm9XFyG7fiqBMkozF2ay8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [AI-generated outlines and drafts with human expert review and editing](https://fathom.video/share/MjRumGz4RVnm9XFyG7fiqBMkozF2ay8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)
  - [Dedicated managing editor and strategist for each client](https://fathom.video/share/MjRumGz4RVnm9XFyG7fiqBMkozF2ay8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [Adaptable to various industries and content types (e.g., technical, regulated industries)](https://fathom.video/share/MjRumGz4RVnm9XFyG7fiqBMkozF2ay8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)

### Potential Engagement Model

  - [Starts with a $9,000 monthly retainer](https://fathom.video/share/MjRumGz4RVnm9XFyG7fiqBMkozF2ay8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
  - [Includes dedicated strategist and managing editor](https://fathom.video/share/MjRumGz4RVnm9XFyG7fiqBMkozF2ay8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1736.0)
  - [Commits to up to 100,000 words per month](https://fathom.video/share/MjRumGz4RVnm9XFyG7fiqBMkozF2ay8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1600.0)
  - [Aims to begin publishing within 2-4 weeks of engagement start](https://fathom.video/share/MjRumGz4RVnm9XFyG7fiqBMkozF2ay8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1701.0)
  - [Focuses primarily on web content and articles, with potential for expansion to other content types](https://fathom.video/share/MjRumGz4RVnm9XFyG7fiqBMkozF2ay8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send follow-up email with call recording and additional information](https://fathom.video/share/MjRumGz4RVnm9XFyG7fiqBMkozF2ay8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1875.0)
  - [Prophecy.io team to internally discuss potential engagement](https://fathom.video/share/MjRumGz4RVnm9XFyG7fiqBMkozF2ay8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1880.0)
  - [Consider setting up Slack channel for easier communication (may require NDA)](https://fathom.video/share/MjRumGz4RVnm9XFyG7fiqBMkozF2ay8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1886.0)
  - [Prophecy.io to reach out if interested in further exploring collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/MjRumGz4RVnm9XFyG7fiqBMkozF2ay8W?tab=summary&timestamp=1890.0)
